candidate.description: Naïve Bayes text classifier using token likelihoods under conditional-independence assumption; baseline for spam, sentiment, and topic classification. Mots-clés: clasificador, ベイズ.

l2s.scope_1line: Probabilistic classifier assuming conditional independence between features.
Linear classifier optimizing log-loss; widely used baseline.
End-to-end NLP pipeline: tokenize, vectorize, classify.

l1s.scope_1line: ML applied to understanding and generating human language.
